name: ETW Trace Disabled
notes:
This rule detects a command that clears or disables any ETW trace log which could indicate a logging evasion.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: '@neu5ron, Florian Roth, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community'
SIGMA Title: Disable of ETW Trace
SIGMA Description: Detects a command that clears or disables any ETW trace log which could indicate a logging evasion.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cl%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trace%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-log%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trace%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sl%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:false%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-log%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:false%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%logman%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%update%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trace%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--p%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-ets%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-etwtraceprovider%' OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-etwtraceprovider%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0x11%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY ETW Trace Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%cl%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trace%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%clear-log%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/trace%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%sl%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:false%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-log%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/e:false%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%logman%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%update%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%trace%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%--p%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-ets%') OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%remove-etwtraceprovider%' OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%set-etwtraceprovider%' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%0x11%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects a command that clears or disables any ETW trace log which could indicate a logging evasion.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
